key_sentences.english: Although market competition is fierce, this company has still maintained stable profits.

key_sentences.chinese: 相比之下，国内市场的增长速度远远超过了海外市场。
key_sentences.pinyin: Xiāng bǐ zhī xià, guó nèi shì chǎng de zēng zhǎng sù dù yuǎn yuǎn chāo guò le hǎi wài shì chǎng.
key_sentences.english: By comparison, the growth rate of the domestic market far exceeds that of overseas markets.

key_sentences.chinese: 他们调整了销售策略，以便在激烈的市场竞争中脱颖而出。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā men tiáo zhěng le xiāo shòu cè lüè, yǐ biàn zài jī liè de shì chǎng jìng zhēng zhōng tuō yǐng ér chū.
key_sentences.english: They adjusted their sales strategy in order to stand out in the fierce market competition.

key_sentences.chinese: 尽管谈判过程十分艰难，但双方最终还是签订了合同。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn tán pàn guò chéng shí fēn jiān nán, dàn shuāng fāng zuì zhōng hái shì qiān dìng le hé tong.
key_sentences.english: Although the negotiation process was very difficult, both parties finally signed the contract.

key_sentences.chinese: 这家企业加大投资，以便尽快打造出自己的品牌。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiā qǐ yè jiā dà tóu zī, yǐ biàn jǐn kuài dǎ zào chū zì jǐ de pǐn pái.
key_sentences.english: The company increased its investment in order to build its own brand as quickly as possible.

key_sentences.chinese: 选择合作而非竞争往往能带来更大的经济效益。
key_sentences.pinyin: Xuǎn zé hé zuò ér fēi jìng zhēng wǎng wǎng néng dài lái gèng dà de jīng jì xiào yì.
key_sentences.english: Choosing cooperation over competition often leads to greater economic benefits.

key_sentences.chinese: 企业在激烈的市场竞争中，需要制定有效的品牌策略。
key_sentences.pinyin: Qǐ yè zài jī liè de shì chǎng jìng zhēng zhōng, xū yào zhì dìng yǒu xiào de pǐn pái cè lüè.
key_sentences.english: In fierce market competition, enterprises need to formulate effective brand strategies.

key_sentences.chinese: 通过合作谈判，双方达成了协议，提高了投资利润。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tōng guò hé zuò tán pàn, shuāng fāng dá chéng le xié yì, tí gāo le tóu zī lì rùn.
key_sentences.english: Through cooperative negotiations, both parties reached an agreement and increased investment profits.

key_sentences.chinese: 经济的发展离不开市场竞争和企业之间的合作。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jīng jì de fā zhǎn lí bù kāi shì chǎng jìng zhēng hé qǐ yè zhī jiān de hé zuò.
key_sentences.english: Economic development cannot do without market competition and cooperation between enterprises.

grammar_points.title: 尽管…但… — Although… but…
grammar_points.explanation: This paired conjunction expresses a concession: 尽管 introduces a fact or circumstance that one might expect to affect the outcome, but 但 (or 但是) signals that the expected result does not follow. Structure: 尽管 + clause A, + 但/但是 + clause B. Both clauses can share the same subject, or have different subjects. This pattern is common in formal speech and writing. 尽管困难很多，但他们坚持下来了 - Although there were many difficulties, they persisted.

examples.chinese: 尽管经济形势不太好，但这家企业的利润依然增长了。
examples.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn jīng jì xíng shì bú tài hǎo, dàn zhè jiā qǐ yè de lì rùn yī rán zēng zhǎng le.
examples.english: Although the economic situation was not very good, this company's profits still grew.

examples.chinese: 尽管谈判耗费了很长时间，但最终双方达成了合作协议。
examples.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn tán pàn hào fèi le hěn cháng shí jiān, dàn zuì zhōng shuāng fāng dá chéng le hé zuò xié yì.
examples.english: Although the negotiations took a very long time, both parties ultimately reached a cooperation agreement.

exercises.question: 尽管这个品牌知名度不高，_____ 销售业绩非常好。
Choose the sentence that uses 尽管…但… correctly.
exercises.correct: 尽管竞争激烈，但这家企业的市场份额不断扩大。
options: 尽管竞争激烈，但这家企业的市场份额不断扩大。
但竞争激烈，尽管这家企业的市场份额不断扩大。
竞争激烈尽管，这家企业的市场份额但不断扩大。
这家企业尽管竞争激烈但，市场份额不断扩大。
option_pinyin: Jǐn guǎn jìng zhēng jī liè, dàn zhè jiā qǐ yè de shì chǎng fèn é bú duàn kuò dà.
Dàn jìng zhēng jī liè, jǐn guǎn zhè jiā qǐ yè de shì chǎng fèn é bú duàn kuò dà.
Jìng zhēng jī liè jǐn guǎn, zhè jiā qǐ yè de shì chǎng fèn é dàn bú duàn kuò dà.
Zhè jiā qǐ yè jǐn guǎn jìng zhēng jī liè dàn, shì chǎng fèn é bú duàn kuò dà.

exercises.question: 尽管投资风险较高，_____ 他们还是决定进入这个市场。
Which word typically follows 尽管 in the second clause?

mini_exercises.question: 尽管...但... expresses...
mini_exercises.correct: A concession: although A is true, B still occurs (an unexpected or contrasting result)
options: A concession: although A is true, B still occurs (an unexpected or contrasting result)
A cause: because of A, B happens
A condition: if A, then B
A sequence: first A, and then B

mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___市场竞争激烈，公司的利润还是增加了。

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 尽管…但…?
mini_exercises.correct: 尽管谈判很艰难，但双方最终达成了协议。
options: 尽管谈判很艰难，但双方最终达成了协议。
谈判尽管很艰难，双方但最终达成了协议。
但尽管谈判很艰难，双方最终达成了协议。
双方尽管谈判，但很艰难最终达成了协议。
option_pinyin: jǐn guǎn tán pàn hěn jiān nán dàn shuāng fāng zuì zhōng dá chéng le xié yì
tán pàn jǐn guǎn hěn jiān nán shuāng fāng dàn zuì zhōng dá chéng le xié yì
dàn jǐn guǎn tán pàn hěn jiān nán shuāng fāng zuì zhōng dá chéng le xié yì
shuāng fāng jǐn guǎn tán pàn dàn hěn jiān nán zuì zhōng dá chéng le xié yì

grammar_points.title: 一(量词)比一(量词) — Each one more than the last
grammar_points.explanation:
一(量词)比一(量词) uses a repeated measure word with 比 between them to express a progressive increase in degree. It emphasizes that something keeps getting more and more so over time or across items.

Structure: 一 + 量词 + 比 + 一 + 量词 + adjective/verb

• 市场竞争一年比一年激烈。
  (Market competition gets more fierce each year.)
• 企业的利润一季度比一季度高。
  (Company profits are higher each quarter than the last.)
• 品牌的知名度一天比一天高。
  (The brand's recognition grows higher day by day.)

Common measure words used:
• 年 (year): 一年比一年… — getting more so year by year
• 天 (day): 一天比一天… — getting more so day by day
• 次 (time): 一次比一次… — getting more so each time
• 个 (item): 一个比一个… — each one more so than the previous

Note: The adjective or verb at the end describes the direction of change, always implying an upward or intensifying trend.

examples.chinese: 市场竞争一年比一年激烈，企业必须不断调整销售策略。
examples.pinyin: shì chǎng jìng zhēng yī nián bǐ yī nián jī liè qǐ yè bì xū bù duàn tiáo zhěng xiāo shòu cè lüè
examples.english: Market competition gets more fierce year by year; enterprises must keep adjusting their sales strategies.

examples.chinese: 这家企业的利润一季度比一季度高，投资者非常满意。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā qǐ yè de lì rùn yī jì dù bǐ yī jì dù gāo tóu zī zhě fēi cháng mǎn yì
examples.english: This company's profit is higher each quarter than the last, and investors are very satisfied.

examples.chinese: 谈判的条件一次比一次严格，双方都感到了压力。
examples.pinyin: tán pàn de tiáo jiàn yī cì bǐ yī cì yán gé shuāng fāng dōu gǎn dào le yā lì
examples.english: The negotiation conditions get stricter each time, and both sides feel the pressure.

exercises.question: 这个品牌的市场销售额一年___一年高，发展非常好。
Which sentence correctly uses 一(量词)比一(量词)?
exercises.correct: 企业的投资回报一年比一年高，利润不断增加。
options: 企业的投资回报一年比一年高，利润不断增加。
企业投资比一年一年高，利润增加。
一年企业的比一年投资回报高，利润增加不断。
企业一年高比一年投资回报，利润不断。
option_pinyin: qǐ yè de tóu zī huí bào yī nián bǐ yī nián gāo lì rùn bù duàn zēng jiā

exercises.question: 谈判进行了很多轮，条件___，双方的压力也越来越大。
option_pinyin: yī cì bǐ yī cì yán gé

mini_exercises.question: 一年比一年激烈 means...
mini_exercises.correct: Getting more intense year by year (progressive increase)
options: Getting more intense year by year (progressive increase)
Exactly as intense as last year (no change)
Intense for one year, then stops

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: This company's sales are higher each year than the last.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 这家企业的销售额一年___一年高，发展势头非常好。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 这家企业的销售额一年___一年高，发展势头非常好。
mini_exercises.question_english: This company's sales are higher each year than the last, showing great momentum.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 一(量词)比一(量词)?
mini_exercises.correct: 市场竞争一年比一年激烈，企业必须不断调整策略。
options: 市场竞争一年比一年激烈，企业必须不断调整策略。
市场一年激烈比一年，策略企业调整。
竞争一年比激烈一年，企业调整策略不断。
企业一年比一年调整策略，市场竞争激烈。
option_pinyin: shì chǎng jìng zhēng yī nián bǐ yī nián jī liè qǐ yè bì xū bù duàn tiáo zhěng cè lüè

grammar_points.title: 以便 — So as to; in order to
grammar_points.explanation: 以便 is a conjunction meaning 'so as to' or 'in order to facilitate'. It introduces a purpose clause that explains the intended benefit of the action in the main clause. Structure: main action + 以便 + purpose/result. Unlike 为了 (which can stand alone or precede the subject), 以便 always appears mid-sentence, connecting two clauses with the same subject. It is more formal than 为了. 我们提前发出通知，以便大家做好准备 - We sent the notice in advance so that everyone could prepare.

examples.chinese: 公司决定降低价格，以便吸引更多消费者进入市场。
examples.pinyin: Gōng sī jué dìng jiàng dī jià gé, yǐ biàn xī yǐn gèng duō xiāo fèi zhě jìn rù shì chǎng.
examples.english: The company decided to lower prices in order to attract more consumers into the market.

examples.chinese: 他们在谈判前做了充分的准备，以便在关键时刻掌握主动权。
examples.pinyin: Tā men zài tán pàn qián zuò le chōng fèn de zhǔn bèi, yǐ biàn zài guān jiàn shí kè zhǎng wò zhǔ dòng quán.
examples.english: They made thorough preparations before the negotiations in order to hold the initiative at critical moments.

exercises.question: 企业加大了对研发的投资，_____ 开发出更具竞争力的产品。
Choose the sentence that uses 以便 correctly.
exercises.correct: 他们提前展开谈判，以便尽早签订合同。
options: 他们提前展开谈判，以便尽早签订合同。
以便他们提前展开谈判，尽早签订合同。
他们以便提前，展开谈判尽早签订合同。
尽早签订合同，他们以便提前展开谈判。
option_pinyin: Tā men tí qián zhǎn kāi tán pàn, yǐ biàn jǐn zǎo qiān dìng hé tong.
Yǐ biàn tā men tí qián zhǎn kāi tán pàn, jǐn zǎo qiān dìng hé tong.
Tā men yǐ biàn tí qián, zhǎn kāi tán pàn jǐn zǎo qiān dìng hé tong.
Jǐn zǎo qiān dìng hé tong, tā men yǐ biàn tí qián zhǎn kāi tán pàn.

exercises.question: What does 以便 mean?
exercises.correct: So as to; in order to
options: So as to; in order to

exercises.question: 他们打造了强大的品牌形象，_____ 在竞争中占据有利地位。
Which statement about 以便 is correct?
exercises.correct: It always appears mid-sentence to introduce a purpose clause
options: It always appears mid-sentence to introduce a purpose clause
It can begin a sentence before the subject
It expresses a contrast between two facts
It introduces a cause or reason

mini_exercises.question: 以便 + VP means...
mini_exercises.correct: So as to / In order to (do something) — a formal expression of purpose that enables a smoother outcome
options: So as to / In order to (do something) — a formal expression of purpose that enables a smoother outcome
Even though — a concession that the following action contradicts
As a result — the consequence of the previous action
No matter what — an unconditional statement

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Please sign the contract in advance so as to allow smooth cooperation.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 请提前签好合同，___顺利合作。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 请提前签好合同，___顺利合作。
mini_exercises.question_english: Please sign the contract in advance so as to allow smooth cooperation.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 以便?
mini_exercises.correct: 他认真研究了市场策略，以便更好地开展业务。
options: 他认真研究了市场策略，以便更好地开展业务。
以便他认真研究了市场策略，更好地开展业务。
他认真以便研究了，市场策略更好地开展业务。
更好地开展业务，他以便认真研究了市场策略。
option_pinyin: tā rèn zhēn yán jiū le shì chǎng cè lüè yǐ biàn gèng hǎo de kāi zhǎn yè wù
yǐ biàn tā rèn zhēn yán jiū le shì chǎng cè lüè gèng hǎo de kāi zhǎn yè wù
tā rèn zhēn yǐ biàn yán jiū le shì chǎng cè lüè gèng hǎo de kāi zhǎn yè wù
gèng hǎo de kāi zhǎn yè wù tā yǐ biàn rèn zhēn yán jiū le shì chǎng cè lüè

culture_notes.title: China's Rise as a Global Economic Power
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国成为全球经济强国
culture_notes.content: China has become the world's second-largest economy and a major driver of global growth. Since the economic reforms of the 1980s, the country has attracted enormous foreign investment (投资, tóu zī) and built a massive manufacturing base. Today, Chinese enterprises (企业, qǐ yè) compete in nearly every global market, and homegrown brands (品牌, pǐn pái) such as Huawei, Alibaba, and BYD have achieved international recognition. China's domestic market (市场, shì chǎng), with its 1.4 billion consumers, is a key target for companies worldwide. Business negotiations (谈判, tán pàn) in China often emphasise relationship-building alongside formal contract discussions, reflecting cultural values of trust and long-term cooperation. Understanding both the business environment and cultural norms is essential for successful commercial activity in China.

idioms.english: Mutual benefit and shared success — a common principle in Chinese business negotiations

quiz.question: What does the phrase 开拓市场 mean?
Fill in the blank: 尽管谈判很艰难，_____ 双方最终达成了协议。
What does 尽管…但… express?
quiz.correct: A concession — something is true despite a contrary fact
options: A concession — something is true despite a contrary fact

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 他们早做准备，_____ 在竞争中占据优势。
Which sentence uses 以便 correctly?
quiz.correct: 请提前发邮件，以便我做好准备。
options: 请提前发邮件，以便我做好准备。
以便请提前发邮件，我做好准备。
请提前以便发邮件，我做好准备。
请提前发邮件我做好准备，以便。

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence using 相比之下.
quiz.correct: A公司发展缓慢，相比之下，B公司增长迅速。
options: A公司发展缓慢，相比之下，B公司增长迅速。
相比之下A公司，发展缓慢B公司增长迅速。
A公司相比之下，发展缓慢但B公司增长迅速。
B公司增长迅速，A公司相比之下发展缓慢但。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 吸引投资 mean?
What does the phrase 签订合同 mean?
According to the culture note, which Chinese brand is mentioned as having achieved international recognition?
What does the phrase 打造品牌 mean?
What does the idiom 互利共赢 mean?
Fill in: 企业在激烈的市场竞争中，需要制定有效的 _____ 策略。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 林经理，感谢您来参加今天的谈判。希望通过这次合作，我们能共同开拓国际市场。
lines.pinyin: Lín jīng lǐ, gǎn xiè nín lái cān jiā jīn tiān de tán pàn. Xī wàng tōng guò zhè cì hé zuò, wǒ men néng gòng tóng kāi tuò guó jì shì chǎng.
lines.english: Manager Lin, thank you for coming to today's negotiation. We hope that through this cooperation, we can jointly open up the international market.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我们也很期待。尽管目前市场竞争非常激烈，但我相信双方的合作能带来可观的利润。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men yě hěn qī dài. Jǐn guǎn mù qián shì chǎng jìng zhēng fēi cháng jī liè, dàn wǒ xiāng xìn shuāng fāng de hé zuò néng dài lái kě guān de lì rùn.
lines.english: We are also looking forward to it. Although market competition is currently very fierce, I believe our cooperation can bring considerable profits.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 相比之下，我们的品牌在亚洲地区的知名度更高，这对销售有很大帮助。
lines.pinyin: Xiāng bǐ zhī xià, wǒ men de pǐn pái zài Yà zhōu dì qū de zhī míng dù gèng gāo, zhè duì xiāo shòu yǒu hěn dà bāng zhù.
lines.english: By comparison, our brand has a higher profile in the Asian region, which is a great advantage for sales.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 明白了。我们需要制定一个清晰的策略，以便在最短的时间内打入市场。
lines.pinyin: Míng bai le. Wǒ men xū yào zhì dìng yí gè qīng xī de cè lüè, yǐ biàn zài zuì duǎn de shí jiān nèi dǎ rù shì chǎng.
lines.english: I see. We need to formulate a clear strategy in order to enter the market in the shortest possible time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 同意。我们建议尽快签订合同，以便双方都可以立即开始准备工作。
lines.pinyin: Tóng yì. Wǒ men jiàn yì jǐn kuài qiān dìng hé tong, yǐ biàn shuāng fāng dōu kě yǐ lì jí kāi shǐ zhǔn bèi gōng zuò.
lines.english: Agreed. We suggest concluding the contract as soon as possible so that both parties can immediately begin preparations.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没问题。尽管还有一些细节需要确认，但我认为合同本周内可以签署。
lines.pinyin: Méi wèn tí. Jǐn guǎn hái yǒu yì xiē xì jié xū yào què rèn, dàn wǒ rèn wéi hé tong běn zhōu nèi kě yǐ qiān shǔ.
lines.english: No problem. Although there are still some details to confirm, I believe the contract can be signed within this week.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了！期待我们的合作, 互利共赢！
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Qī dài wǒ men de hé zuò, hù lì gòng yíng!
lines.english: Excellent! I look forward to our cooperation being mutually beneficial!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王顾问，我想在国内市场投资开设一家新企业，您怎么看？
lines.pinyin: Wáng gù wèn, wǒ xiǎng zài guó nèi shì chǎng tóu zī kāi shè yì jiā xīn qǐ yè, nín zěn me kàn?
lines.english: Advisor Wang, I'm thinking of investing in the domestic market to set up a new enterprise. What do you think?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 现在经济形势不错，尽管竞争激烈，但国内市场需求很大，值得投资。
lines.pinyin: Xiàn zài jīng jì xíng shì bú cuò, jǐn guǎn jìng zhēng jī liè, dàn guó nèi shì chǎng xū qiú hěn dà, zhí dé tóu zī.
lines.english: The economic situation is good now. Although competition is fierce, domestic market demand is great, making it worth investing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我打算从品牌建设入手，打造出有竞争力的产品，以便吸引更多消费者。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ dǎ suàn cóng pǐn pái jiàn shè rù shǒu, dǎ zào chū yǒu jìng zhēng lì de chǎn pǐn, yǐ biàn xī yǐn gèng duō xiāo fèi zhě.
lines.english: I plan to start with brand building and create competitive products in order to attract more consumers.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 品牌营销的投入虽然大，但长期来看能带来更稳定的利润。
lines.pinyin: Pǐn pái yíng xiāo de tóu rù suī rán dà, dàn cháng qī lái kàn néng dài lái gèng wěn dìng de lì rùn.
lines.english: Although brand marketing requires a large investment, in the long run it brings more stable profits.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那我还需要学习如何进行商务谈判，签订对自己有利的合同。
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ hái xū yào xué xí rú hé jìn xíng shāng wù tán pàn, qiān dìng duì zì jǐ yǒu lì de hé tong.
lines.english: Then I also need to learn how to conduct business negotiations and sign contracts that are advantageous to me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，谈判策略非常重要。尽管每次谈判情况不同，但做好准备总是对的。
lines.pinyin: Duì, tán pàn cè lüè fēi cháng zhòng yào. Jǐn guǎn měi cì tán pàn qíng kuàng bù tóng, dàn zuò hǎo zhǔn bèi zǒng shì duì de.
lines.english: Yes, negotiation strategy is very important. Although every negotiation is different, being well prepared is always right.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢您的建议！我会认真研究市场，制定一套完整的销售策略。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nín de jiàn yì! Wǒ huì rèn zhēn yán jiū shì chǎng, zhì dìng yí tào wán zhěng de xiāo shòu cè lüè.
lines.english: Thank you for your advice! I will study the market carefully and develop a complete sales strategy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 祝您成功！记住，互利共赢才是长期合作的基础。
lines.pinyin: Zhù nín chéng gōng! Jì zhù, hù lì gòng yíng cái shì cháng qī hé zuò de jī chǔ.
lines.english: I wish you success! Remember, mutual benefit is the foundation of long-term cooperation.
